misc.title: #ONEPIECE Just imagine... Luffy and Loki losing, Imu about to nuke the island and boom... The real current Rain God shows up... Pew (@pewpiece) 🚨 OFFICIAL: Eiichiro Oda sent a message to Kohei Tanaka
misc.text: #ONEPIECE Just imagine... Luffy and Loki losing, Imu about to nuke the island and boom... The real current Rain God shows up... Pew (@pewpiece) 🚨 OFFICIAL: Eiichiro Oda sent a message to Kohei Tanaka (onepiece music composer) about the “Rain God Zaza” “I want something terrifying but also cool. Please.” Tanaka says Oda sent him this request through LINE — https://nitter.net/pewpiece/status/2054138857893802191#m

misc.title: 'Blue Lock' Author has greenlit the Project in Real-life with Japan's Football Association. Aiming to recruit 15 year old strikers as "pure egoists who want to win the World Cup" to birth a monster ca
misc.text: 'Blue Lock' Author has greenlit the Project in Real-life with Japan's Football Association. Aiming to recruit 15 year old strikers as "pure egoists who want to win the World Cup" to birth a monster capable of devouring the competition.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE Eiichiro Oda sent a message to Kohei Tanaka (onepiece music composer) about the “Rain God Zaza” “I want something terrifying but also cool. Please.” Tells a lot how much Oda cares for Zaza's
misc.text: #ONEPIECE Eiichiro Oda sent a message to Kohei Tanaka (onepiece music composer) about the “Rain God Zaza” “I want something terrifying but also cool. Please.” Tells a lot how much Oda cares for Zaza's character/meaning.

misc.title: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a br
misc.text: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a bridge between white and black people is a huge symbol against racism!❤️ #BORUTO

misc.title: It’s not looking good for BoruSara shippers. If you look at both Sarada’s and Kawaki’s eye you can see that if you overlap those eyes they fill their empty space completely. And we know Ikemoto loves
misc.text: It’s not looking good for BoruSara shippers. If you look at both Sarada’s and Kawaki’s eye you can see that if you overlap those eyes they fill their empty space completely. And we know Ikemoto loves symbolism. KawaSara is possible to become the canon ship… #BORUTO

misc.title: And before you start saying I am an ungrateful person: I’m not, I just want something more for the 10 years anniversary. I swear Dasiens Manga animations back then were better than this lol
misc.text: And before you start saying I am an ungrateful person: I’m not, I just want something more for the 10 years anniversary. I swear Dasiens Manga animations back then were better than this lol

misc.title: And I just saw this now: It’s not even the only “Manga animated Music Video” there. This shit is NOTHING special. We really got the ‘bare minimum’ for the 10th year anniversary😭😭
misc.text: And I just saw this now: It’s not even the only “Manga animated Music Video” there. This shit is NOTHING special. We really got the ‘bare minimum’ for the 10th year anniversary😭😭

misc.title: I will be honest now: The Boruto fandom NEEDS to raise their standards. Y‘all can’t be happy with only a music video with a Manga animation which isn’t even good. It was supposed to be a 10 years anni
misc.text: I will be honest now: The Boruto fandom NEEDS to raise their standards. Y‘all can’t be happy with only a music video with a Manga animation which isn’t even good. It was supposed to be a 10 years anniversary for the Manga of the most iconic AniManga franchise… #BORUTO #NARUTO
